defs: An extremely adhesive viscid substance, usually made of the middle bark of the holly, by boiling, fermenting, and cleansing it. When a twig is smeared with this substance it will hold small birds which may light upon it. Hence: Anything which insnares.
quotes: Not birdlime or Idean pitch produce A more tenacious mass of clammy juice.
notes: ☞ Birdlime is also made from mistletoe, elder, etc.

defs: To smear with birdlime; to catch with birdlime; to insnare.
quotes: When the heart is thus birdlimed, then it cleaves to everything it meets with.
